currentChartValues.primary_reason_for_home_health_medical_n: Janice Harper, a 78-year-old female, has been referred for home health care following her recent surgery for lumbar decompression and fusion at the L5-S1 level, represented by the primary diagnosis of post-surgical care (ICD 10: 798.1). In addition to her primary condition, she is experiencing chronic lumbar pain (M54.5) post-surgery, with notable functional limitations such as reduced motor strength in her right lower extremity, along with tingling and numbness, which further complicate her recovery and mobility.

extractedFieldValues.current_value: Janice Harper, a 78-year-old female, has been referred for home health care following her recent surgery for lumbar decompression and fusion at the L5-S1 level, represented by the primary diagnosis of post-surgical care (ICD 10: 798.1). In addition to her primary condition, she is experiencing chronic lumbar pain (M54.5) post-surgery, with notable functional limitations such as reduced motor strength in her right lower extremity, along with tingling and numbness, which further complicate her recovery and mobility. These symptoms necessitate skilled nursing care for wound management and monitoring, as well as physical therapy to address her mobility deficits and pain management.
